data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of routing based on score/policy, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm this functionality. The prior steps focus on customer bookings and waitlist entries, but there is no evidence of a scoring mechanism or routing logic being applied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of routing to queue/review/workflow based on score/policy.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the routing based on score/policy.
